name: Child ID Card
css: .id-card { width: 340px; border: 2px solid #2490ef; border-radius: 10px; padding: 14px; font-family: sans-serif; } .id-card h2 { margin: 0 0 2px 0; font-size: 16px; } .id-card .sub { color: #888; font-size: 11px; margin-bottom: 10px; } .id-card .photo { width: 70px; height: 70px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 6px; float: left; margin-right: 10px; border: 1px solid #ddd; } .id-card .qr { display: block; margin: 10px auto 0 auto; width: 130px; }
html:
{% if doc.photo %}{% endif %}

{{ doc.full_name }}

Rhema Daycare — Child ID Card
Classroom: {{ doc.assigned_classroom or "—" }}
Child ID: {{ doc.name }}
Scan at gate check-in / check-out
